title: Sales Operations Analyst
description: Goldman Sachs is seeking a Sales Operations Analyst to optimize revenue operations for our Boston-based institutional sales team. You'll design systems, manage data flows, and drive process improvements that enhance sales effectiveness. This role offers exposure to sophisticated financial systems and the opportunity to work with world-class sales leaders.
responsibilities: Design and maintain Salesforce configurations that align with sales team workflows and reporting requirements
Build and manage sales dashboards, pipeline reports, and forecast tracking systems
Analyze sales data to identify trends, opportunities, and operational inefficiencies
Coordinate system implementations and conduct user training sessions
Conduct quarterly reviews with sales leadership to assess tool adoption and process effectiveness

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Computer Science, or related field
skills: SQL and Excel for data analysis and reporting
Understanding of sales processes and metrics
certifications: Salesforce Administrator or Advanced Administrator certification (required)

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
